docs.title: Checkout instructions: standalone
docs.text:
You need to setup python 2.7 and a recent ROOT version first.

git clone https://github.com/mukundshelake/NanoAODTools.git NanoAODTools
cd NanoAODTools
bash standalone/env_standalone.sh build
source standalone/env_standalone.sh

Repeat only the last command at the beginning of every session.

Please never commit neither the build directory, nor the empty init.py files created by the script.

docs.title: Selection
docs.text:
This is stage just afterwards our input (i.e. skimmed) datasets.

  • It trims the branches to select few
  • Filters the data events based on the golden json file.
  • It applies following modules
    • LHE Weight Sign
    • Muon ID
    • Muon HLT
    • B-Tagging

docs.title: Skimmed
docs.text:
It is called as 'skimmed' in configurations.

The list of the samples processed is located at here and similar files in thes ame folder

  • [ ] Get the files locally

docs.title: Confirm that the datasets are as we expect in these files
